data.name: ValidationErrorTaskSetPath
data.value: Select or enter the path to the task set.

data.name: ValidationErrorTaskModelMismatchWithReference
data.value: The reference model does not match task model.

data.name: ValidationErrorZeroTaskTest
data.value: Add at least one test case.

data.name: XmlMissingRootTask
data.value: The XML file does not have a <tasks> root element.

data.name: ToolTipFormula
data.value:
Syntax: c1#symbol + c2#symbol + ... = kn + q
Example: 1#a+1#b=2n+0

data.name: ToolTipRegex
data.value:
Supported: * - repetition | - alternative () - grouping [] - character set
Examples: a*b (a|b)*abb [0-9]+ (a|b)*abba(a|b)*

data.name: ToolTipReference
data.value:
Supported models: .fa - finite automaton .pa - pushdown automaton .tm - Turing machine
Reference model must be the same as task model!

data.name: ToolTipSpecification
data.value:
Mathematical expressions can be used to write specifications. They are written in MathJax syntax, similar to LaTeX.
Common mathematical constructs are supported: - superscripts and subscripts - Greek symbols - sets - mathematical relations and operators - block expressions using $$ ... $$

data.name: ToolTipTestCases
data.value:
Manual test cases for verifying the solution.
Each word can be marked as: - Accept - Reject
These tests will be used during the solution review. An empty word can be entered as ε or a single space.

data.name: UnknownModeError
data.value: Unknown mode: {0}. Contact the person who assigned the task—your lecturer or teaching assistant.

data.name: TransitionSyntaxError
data.value: The solution contains syntax errors in transition functions.

data.name: AutomatonMismatchError
data.value: The automaton is incorrect. It differs on the word '{0}'. Expected: {1}. Student automaton: {2}.

data.name: MissingReferenceModel
data.value: Task does not contain a reference model. Contact the person who assigned the task—your lecturer or teaching assistant.

data.name: ReferenceModelSyntaxError
data.value: Reference model contains syntax errors. Contact the person who assigned the task—your lecturer or teaching assistant.

data.name: AutomatonNoStates
data.value: Automaton does not contain any states.

data.name: AutomatonNoStartState
data.value: Automaton does not have an initial state.

data.name: AutomatonInvalidSymbol
data.value: Automaton uses an invalid or forbidden symbol '{0}'.

data.name: AutomatonNoFinalState
data.value: Automaton does not have any final state.

data.name: AutomatonNotDeterministic
data.value: Automaton is not deterministic. State '{0}' has multiple transitions for symbol '{1}'.

data.name: RegexUnclosedSet
data.value: Regex contains an unclosed character set [].

data.name: RegexNoAlphabetSymbols
data.value: Regex does not contain any alphabet symbols.

data.name: ToolTipTestWords
data.value:
Manual test words for verifying the solution.
These tests will be used during the solution review. An empty word can be entered as ε or a single space.

data.name: ValidationErrorRecursionDepth
data.value: Recursion depth is in the wrong format or is empty.
